task_completion.description: Adjust the slice thickness for the Coronal view to at least 40.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: InVesalius GUI showing the Coronal view with a thick slab effect (resembling an X-ray), and a UI element (such as a slider, text box, or overlay text) indicating the slice thickness is set to 40.0 mm or higher.

task_completion.description: Adjust the slice thickness for the Sagittal view to at least 40.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: InVesalius GUI showing the Sagittal view with a thick slab effect, and a UI element indicating the slice thickness is set to 40.0 mm or higher.

task_completion.description: Export the Coronal thick-slab view as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export picture' dialog box triggered from the Coronal view, showing the filename 'coronal_thick_slab.png' and the destination directory as '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: Export the Sagittal thick-slab view as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export picture' dialog box triggered from the Sagittal view, showing the filename 'sagittal_thick_slab.png' and the destination directory as '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: Verify both exported PNG files exist in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing both 'coronal_thick_slab.png' and 'sagittal_thick_slab.png' present in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius GUI to create the thick slab reconstructions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show active interaction with the InVesalius application window, specifically using its native tools to adjust slice thickness and export images, rather than using terminal commands to generate fake images.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality to save the images
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialogs shown must belong to the InVesalius application. The agent should not be downloading images from a browser or copying pre-existing files.

integrity.description: The agent is working with the correct CT Cranium dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: The medical images visible in the InVesalius 2D/3D viewports should clearly depict a human skull/cranium.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adjusting the slice thickness to at least 40.0 mm for both Coronal and Sagittal views in InVesalius. The resulting images must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/coronal_thick_slab.png and /home/ga/Documents/sagittal_thick_slab.png. The exported files must be genuine PNG images exceeding 20,000 bytes in size, which indicates they are actual image exports and not empty or placeholder files.
